name: TRANSUITE.ORG INC.
business: TRANSUITE ORG INC. generates revenue from AI-Driven Ecosystem Product Planning consulting services and, through its wholly owned subsidiary Solan (Shenzhen) Technology Co., Ltd., online medical education. The company also plans to expand strategic consulting, enterprise technology, and infrastructure-related service opportunities.

exposures.sentence: During the year ended December 31, 2025, the Company generated revenue from its AI-Driven Ecosystem Product Planning consulting service of $115,000
the Company s wholly owned subsidiary Solan (Shenzhen) Technology Co., Ltd. recognized online medical education revenue of $2,765
Strategic Expansion integrating acquired businesses and developing scalable Web3, digital asset, and infrastructure platforms
